attributes.description: Azure platform health signals: ServiceHealth incidents, ResourceHealth status, Policy compliance, and Advisor recommendations. Monitor external reliability factors.

params.markdown:
## [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Platform Health

This dashboard monitors Azure platform health signals:
- Service health incidents and maintenance events
- Resource health status and state transitions
- Policy compliance vs violations
- Advisor recommendations by category
- Active alerts and monitoring signals
- Detailed event logs for incident investigation

query.esql:
FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Incident"
| STATS incidents = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Incident"
| STATS incidents = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IN ("Unavailable", "Degraded")
| STATS unhealthy = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IN ("Unavailable", "Degraded")
| STATS unhealthy = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Policy"
| WHERE azure.policy.compliance_check == false
| STATS violations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Policy"
| WHERE azure.policy.compliance_check == false
| STATS violations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Recommendation"
| STATS recommendations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Recommendation"
| STATS recommendations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Alert"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Activated", "Active")
| STATS alerts = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Alert"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Activated", "Active")
| STATS alerts = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Maintenance"
| STATS maintenance = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Maintenance"
| STATS maintenance = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), azure.servicehealth.incident.type
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), azure.servicehealth.incident.type
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.resourcehealth.state
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 6

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.resourcehealth.state
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 6

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.service IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY azure.servicehealth.service
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.service IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY azure.servicehealth.service
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Policy"
| EVAL compliance = CASE(azure.policy.compliance_check == true, "Compliant", "NonCompliant")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY compliance
| SORT count DESC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Policy"
| EVAL compliance = CASE(azure.policy.compliance_check == true, "Compliant", "NonCompliant")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY compliance
| SORT count DESC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Recommendation"
| WHERE azure.recommendation.category IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.recommendation.category
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Recommendation"
| WHERE azure.recommendation.category IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.recommendation.category
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.cause IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.resourcehealth.cause
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 5

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.cause IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.resourcehealth.cause
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 5

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.servicehealth.title, azure.servicehealth.incident.type, azure.servicehealth.state, azure.servicehealth.service, azure.servicehealth.region
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.servicehealth.title, azure.servicehealth.incident.type, azure.servicehealth.state, azure.servicehealth.service, azure.servicehealth.region
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.resourcehealth.state, azure.resourcehealth.previous_state, azure.resourcehealth.title, azure.resourcehealth.type, azure.resourcehealth.cause, cloud.resource_id
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.resourcehealth.state, azure.resourcehealth.previous_state, azure.resourcehealth.title, azure.resourcehealth.type, azure.resourcehealth.cause, cloud.resource_id
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50

attributes.title: [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Platform Health
